# kSecUseAuthenticationUISkip

**Global Variable**

A value that indicates items requiring user authentication should be skipped.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecUseAuthenticationUISkip: CFString
```

## Discussion

Silently skip any items that require user authentication. Only use this value with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] function.
title: kSecUseAuthenticationUISkip
